disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden-onset severe pain starting in the right loin/back and radiating down to the ipsilateral groin and testicle
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and does it move anywhere?
Can you point to where it started and where it travels?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started deep in my right side and back and then shoots straight down into my groin and testicle.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Extreme restlessness — unable to find any comfortable position, constantly pacing and writhing
trigger_question_examples: Does anything ease it — does lying still help?
Are you able to keep still or do you need to move?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't keep still at all — lying down makes it worse, I just have to keep moving and pacing.

trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed anything different about your urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, my last wee looked pink, like there was some blood in it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Nausea with three episodes of vomiting since onset
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt sick or been vomiting?
Have you been able to keep anything down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel really sick and I've thrown up three times since it started.

trigger_question_examples: Does it hurt or sting when you wee?
Do you feel a strong sudden urge to pass urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, it stings when I go and I keep feeling like I desperately need to, even when there's not much there.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Oral analgesia already taken (ibuprofen ~1 hour ago) with no relief
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken any painkillers, and did they help?
What have you tried for the pain so far?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took some ibuprofen about an hour ago and it did absolutely nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, shivering or shaking chills reported
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever, shivers or shaking chills?
Do you feel hot and cold or sweaty from a temperature?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever or shivering that I've noticed — the sweating is just from how bad the pain is.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I haven't taken my temperature, but I don't feel feverish, just in agony.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No prior episodes; not a known abdominal-aneurysm risk profile as far as the patient is aware; no fainting or collapse
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt faint, dizzy or like you might pass out?
Any tearing sensation, and have you ever been told about a swelling on your main blood vessel?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't fainted or felt like passing out, and no one's ever told me about anything wrong with my blood vessels.

trigger_question_examples: Are you still able to pass urine?
When did you last wee and were you able to go?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I'm still weeing — it just stings and looks pink.
